headline: FedEx sum-of-the-parts valuation points to upside as freight spin-off approaches, UBS says
summary: UBS is sticking with a Buy rating on FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX, XETRA:FDX) and a price target of $445, as the company gets ready to spin off its freight business into a standalone stock next week. The freight unit, set to trade under the ticker FDXF, enters when-issued trading on May 27, with...
